# forceDelete

**Instance Method**

Deletes one or more records regardless of conflicts.

## Declaration

```swift
RecordsBatchBuilder forceDelete(
	CloudKit.Record|CloudKit.Record[] records
);
```

## Parameters

- **records**: A [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.Record] dictionary representing the record to delete, if you are deleting a single record. If you are deleting multiple records, this parameter is an array of [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.Record] dictionaries. The `recordChangeTag` key is not required in the [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.Record] dictionaries.

## Return Value

The object that received this method call.

## Deleting Records

- **delete**: Deletes one or more records.
